description: Analyze manufacturing process data from a predictive maintenance system in WPS Spreadsheet using '/home/ga/Documents/production_data.xlsx'. Create three new analysis sheets while leaving the 'RawData' sheet untouched. On a sheet named 'Failure Summary', calculate 'Total Count' (based on 'Type' in column C), 'Failed Count' (where 'Machine failure' in column I is 1), and 'Failure Rate (%)' for product types 'H', 'M', and 'L', including a total row. On a sheet named 'Failure Types', create a matrix of failure types (TWF, HDF, PWF, OSF, RNF from columns J-N) by product type ('H', 'M', 'L') with row and column totals. On a sheet named
